<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./worktrees/276-fast-tap-queue/src/components/answer-game/answer-game-reducer.ts`

```text
1	import type {
2	  AnswerGameAction,
3	  AnswerGameConfig,
4	  AnswerGamePhase,
5	  AnswerGameState,
6	  AnswerZone,
7	  TileItem,
8	} from './types';
9	
10	export function makeInitialState(
11	  config: AnswerGameConfig,
12	): AnswerGameState {
13	  return {
14	    config,
15	    allTiles: [],
16	    bankTileIds: [],
17	    zones: [],
18	    activeSlotIndex: 0,
19	    dragActiveTileId: null,
20	    dragHoverZoneIndex: null,
21	    dragHoverBankTileId: null,
22	    phase: 'playing',
23	    roundIndex: 0,
24	    retryCount: 0,
25	    levelIndex: 0,
26	    isLevelMode: config.levelMode !== undefined,
27	  };
28	}
29	
30	/**
31	 * Find the best next activeSlotIndex after a placement or removal.
32	 * Priority: first empty slot after `afterIndex`, then first empty slot
33	 * anywhere, then first wrong slot anywhere. Returns `fallback` when every
34	 * slot is correctly filled.
35	 */
36	function findNextActiveSlot(
37	  zones: AnswerZone[],
38	  afterIndex: number,
39	  fallback: number,
40	): number {
41	  // 1. First empty slot after the current action
42	  const nextEmpty = zones.findIndex(
43	    (z, i) => i > afterIndex && z.placedTileId === null,
44	  );
45	  if (nextEmpty !== -1) return nextEmpty;
46	
47	  // 2. First empty slot anywhere (wraps around)
48	  const anyEmpty = zones.findIndex((z) => z.placedTileId === null);
49	  if (anyEmpty !== -1) return anyEmpty;
50	
51	  // 3. First wrong slot anywhere (so user can retype)
52	  const anyWrong = zones.findIndex((z) => z.isWrong);
53	  if (anyWrong !== -1) return anyWrong;
54	
55	  return fallback;
56	}
57	
58	function resolveCompletionPhase(
59	  state: AnswerGameState,
60	): AnswerGamePhase {
61	  const isLastRound = state.roundIndex >= state.config.totalRounds - 1;
62	  if (!isLastRound) return 'round-complete';
63	  if (!state.isLevelMode) return 'game-over';
64	  const maxLevels = state.config.levelMode?.maxLevels;
65	  if (maxLevels && state.levelIndex + 1 >= maxLevels)
66	    return 'game-over';
67	  return 'level-complete';
68	}
69	
70	export function answerGameReducer(
71	  state: AnswerGameState,
72	  action: AnswerGameAction,
73	): AnswerGameState {
74	  switch (action.type) {
75	    case 'INIT_ROUND': {
76	      return {
77	        ...state,
78	        allTiles: action.tiles,
79	        bankTileIds: action.tiles.map((t: TileItem) => t.id),
80	        zones: action.zones,
81	        activeSlotIndex: 0,
82	        phase: 'playing',
83	        roundIndex: 0,
84	        retryCount: 0,
85	      };
86	    }
87	
88	    case 'RESUME_ROUND': {
89	      const { draft } = action;
90	      return {
91	        ...state,
92	        allTiles: draft.allTiles,
93	        bankTileIds: draft.bankTileIds,
94	        zones: draft.zones,
95	        activeSlotIndex: draft.activeSlotIndex,
96	        phase: draft.phase,
97	        roundIndex: draft.roundIndex,
98	        retryCount: draft.retryCount,
99	        levelIndex: draft.levelIndex,
100	        dragActiveTileId: null,
101	        dragHoverZoneIndex: null,
102	        dragHoverBankTileId: null,
103	      };
104	    }
105	
106	    case 'PLACE_TILE': {
107	      const tile = state.allTiles.find((t) => t.id === action.tileId);
108	      const zone = state.zones[action.zoneIndex];
109	      if (!tile || !zone) return state;
110	
111	      const correct = tile.value === zone.expectedValue;
112	
113	      // A tile placement always ends any active drag for that tile.
114	      const dragActiveTileId =
115	        state.dragActiveTileId === action.tileId
116	          ? null
117	          : state.dragActiveTileId;
118	
119	      if (!correct && state.config.wrongTileBehavior === 'reject') {
120	        return {
121	          ...state,
122	          dragActiveTileId,
123	          retryCount: state.retryCount + 1,
124	        };
125	      }
126	
127	      if (correct) {
128	        const previousId = zone.placedTileId;
129	        const prevIsVirtual = previousId?.startsWith('typed-');
130	        let newBankTileIds = state.bankTileIds.filter(
131	          (id) => id !== action.tileId,
132	        );
133	        if (
134	          previousId !== null &&
135	          previousId !== action.tileId && // Virtual tiles are discarded; real tiles return to the bank.
136	          !prevIsVirtual
137	        ) {
138	          newBankTileIds = [...newBankTileIds, previousId];
139	        }
140	        // Remove displaced virtual tile from allTiles
141	        const newAllTiles = prevIsVirtual
142	          ? state.allTiles.filter((t) => t.id !== previousId)
143	          : state.allTiles;
144	        const newZone: AnswerZone = {
145	          ...zone,
146	          placedTileId: action.tileId,
147	          isWrong: false,
148	          isLocked: false,
149	        };
150	        const newZones =
151	          newAllTiles === state.allTiles
152	            ? state.zones.map((z, i) =>
153	                i === action.zoneIndex ? newZone : z,
154	              )
155	            : state.zones.map((z, i) =>
156	                i === action.zoneIndex ? newZone : z,
157	              );
158	        const allFilledCorrectly = newZones.every(
159	          (z) => z.placedTileId !== null && !z.isWrong,
160	        );
161	        return {
162	          ...state,
163	          allTiles: newAllTiles,
164	          dragActiveTileId,
165	          zones: newZones,
166	          bankTileIds: newBankTileIds,
167	          activeSlotIndex: findNextActiveSlot(
168	            newZones,
169	            action.zoneIndex,
170	            state.activeSlotIndex,
171	          ),
172	          retryCount: state.retryCount,
173	          phase: allFilledCorrectly
174	            ? resolveCompletionPhase(state)
175	            : 'playing',
176	        };
177	      }
178	
179	      const shouldLock =
180	        state.config.wrongTileBehavior === 'lock-manual' ||
181	        state.config.wrongTileBehavior === 'lock-auto-eject';
182	      const previousId = zone.placedTileId;
183	      const prevIsVirtual = previousId?.startsWith('typed-');
184	      const newZone: AnswerZone = {
185	        ...zone,
186	        placedTileId: shouldLock ? action.tileId : zone.placedTileId,
187	        isWrong: true,
188	        isLocked: true,
189	      };
190	      const newZones = state.zones.map((z, i) =>
191	        i === action.zoneIndex ? newZone : z,
192	      );
193	      let newBankTileIds = shouldLock
194	        ? state.bankTileIds.filter((id) => id !== action.tileId)
195	        : state.bankTileIds;
196	      if (
197	        shouldLock &&
198	        previousId &&
199	        previousId !== action.tileId && // Virtual tiles are discarded; real tiles return to the bank.
200	        !prevIsVirtual
201	      ) {
202	        newBankTileIds = [...newBankTileIds, previousId];
203	      }
204	      // Remove displaced virtual tile from allTiles
205	      const newAllTiles =
206	        shouldLock && prevIsVirtual
207	          ? state.allTiles.filter((t) => t.id !== previousId)
208	          : state.allTiles;
209	
210	      return {
211	        ...state,
212	        allTiles: newAllTiles,
213	        dragActiveTileId,
214	        zones: newZones,
215	        bankTileIds: newBankTileIds,
216	        activeSlotIndex: state.activeSlotIndex,
217	        retryCount: state.retryCount + 1,
218	        phase: 'playing',
219	      };
220	    }
221	
222	    case 'TYPE_TILE': {
223	      const zone = state.zones[action.zoneIndex];
224	      if (!zone) return state;
225	      // Allow typing over wrong locked tiles to replace them;
226	      // only block correctly-locked tiles (shouldn't exist, but be safe).
227	      if (zone.isLocked && !zone.isWrong) return state;
228	
229	      const virtualTile: TileItem = {
230	        id: action.tileId,
231	        label: action.value,
232	        value: action.value,
233	      };
234	      const correct =
235	        action.value.toLowerCase() === zone.expectedValue.toLowerCase();
236	
237	      if (!correct && state.config.wrongTileBehavior === 'reject') {
238	        return {
239	          ...state,
240	          retryCount: state.retryCount + 1,
241	        };
242	      }
243	
244	      // Clean up the previous wrong virtual tile being replaced
245	      const previousId = zone.placedTileId;
246	      const prevIsVirtual = previousId?.startsWith('typed-');
247	      const baseTiles = prevIsVirtual
248	        ? state.allTiles.filter((t) => t.id !== previousId)
249	        : state.allTiles;
250	      // If replacing a real (non-virtual) tile, return it to the bank
251	      let baseBankTileIds = state.bankTileIds;
252	      if (previousId && !prevIsVirtual) {
253	        baseBankTileIds = [...baseBankTileIds, previousId];
254	      }
255	
256	      const newAllTiles = [...baseTiles, virtualTile];
257	      const newZone: AnswerZone = {
258	        ...zone,
259	        placedTileId: action.tileId,
260	        isWrong: !correct,
261	        isLocked: !correct,
262	      };
263	      const newZones = state.zones.map((z, i) =>
264	        i === action.zoneIndex ? newZone : z,
265	      );
266	
267	      if (correct) {
268	        const allFilledCorrectly = newZones.every(
269	          (z) => z.placedTileId !== null && !z.isWrong,
270	        );
271	        return {
272	          ...state,
273	          allTiles: newAllTiles,
274	          bankTileIds: baseBankTileIds,
275	          zones: newZones,
276	          activeSlotIndex: findNextActiveSlot(
277	            newZones,
278	            action.zoneIndex,
279	            state.activeSlotIndex,
280	          ),
281	          phase: allFilledCorrectly
282	            ? resolveCompletionPhase(state)
283	            : 'playing',
284	        };
285	      }
286	
287	      return {
288	        ...state,
289	        allTiles: newAllTiles,
290	        bankTileIds: baseBankTileIds,
291	        zones: newZones,
292	        activeSlotIndex: state.activeSlotIndex,
293	        retryCount: state.retryCount + 1,
294	        phase: 'playing',
295	      };
296	    }
297	
298	    case 'REMOVE_TILE': {
299	      const zone = state.zones[action.zoneIndex];
300	      if (!zone?.placedTileId) return state;
301	      const removedTileId = zone.placedTileId;
302	      // Virtual tiles (created by TYPE_TILE) are removed from allTiles
303	      // and NOT returned to the bank.
304	      const isVirtual = removedTileId.startsWith('typed-');
305	      return {
306	        ...state,
307	        dragActiveTileId:
308	          state.dragActiveTileId === removedTileId
309	            ? null
310	            : state.dragActiveTileId,
311	        allTiles: isVirtual
312	          ? state.allTiles.filter((t) => t.id !== removedTileId)
313	          : state.allTiles,
314	        zones: state.zones.map((z, i) =>
315	          i === action.zoneIndex
316	            ? {
317	                ...z,
318	                placedTileId: null,
319	                isWrong: false,
320	                isLocked: false,
321	              }
322	            : z,
323	        ),
324	        bankTileIds: isVirtual
325	          ? state.bankTileIds
326	          : [...state.bankTileIds, removedTileId],
327	        // Move cursor to the cleared slot so the user can retype
328	        activeSlotIndex: action.zoneIndex,
329	      };
330	    }
331	
332	    case 'SWAP_TILES': {
333	      const fromZone = state.zones[action.fromZoneIndex];
334	      const toZone = state.zones[action.toZoneIndex];
335	      if (!fromZone || !toZone) return state;
336	
337	      // After the swap: fromZone gets toZone's tile, toZone gets fromZone's tile.
338	      // Either zone may become empty (null) when moving a tile to an empty slot.
339	      const tileNowInFrom = toZone.placedTileId
340	        ? state.allTiles.find((t) => t.id === toZone.placedTileId)
341	        : null;
342	      const tileNowInTo = fromZone.placedTileId
343	        ? state.allTiles.find((t) => t.id === fromZone.placedTileId)
344	        : null;
345	      // An empty zone is never wrong.
346	      const fromCorrect = tileNowInFrom
347	        ? tileNowInFrom.value === fromZone.expectedValue
348	        : true;
349	      const toCorrect = tileNowInTo
350	        ? tileNowInTo.value === toZone.expectedValue
351	        : true;
352	      const shouldLock =
353	        state.config.wrongTileBehavior === 'lock-manual' ||
354	        state.config.wrongTileBehavior === 'lock-auto-eject';
355	
356	      const newZones = state.zones.map((z, i) => {
357	        if (i === action.fromZoneIndex)
358	          return {
359	            ...z,
360	            placedTileId: toZone.placedTileId,
361	            isWrong: toZone.placedTileId !== null && !fromCorrect,
362	            isLocked:
363	              toZone.placedTileId !== null &&
364	              !fromCorrect &&
365	              shouldLock,
366	          };
367	        if (i === action.toZoneIndex)
368	          return {
369	            ...z,
370	            placedTileId: fromZone.placedTileId,
371	            isWrong: fromZone.placedTileId !== null && !toCorrect,
372	            isLocked:
373	              fromZone.placedTileId !== null &&
374	              !toCorrect &&
375	              shouldLock,
376	          };
377	        return z;
378	      });
379	
380	      // Clear drag state for the tile that just finished dragging.
381	      const dragActiveTileId =
382	        state.dragActiveTileId === fromZone.placedTileId
383	          ? null
384	          : state.dragActiveTileId;
385	
386	      const allFilledCorrectly = newZones.every(
387	        (z) => z.placedTileId !== null && !z.isWrong,
388	      );
389	
390	      return {
391	        ...state,
392	        dragActiveTileId,
393	        zones: newZones,
394	        phase: allFilledCorrectly
395	          ? resolveCompletionPhase(state)
396	          : 'playing',
397	      };
398	    }
399	
400	    case 'EJECT_TILE': {
401	      const zone = state.zones[action.zoneIndex];
402	      if (!zone) return state;
403	
404	      // Guard: never eject a correctly-placed tile (isWrong=false, isLocked=false)
405	      if (!zone.isWrong && !zone.isLocked) return state;
406	
407	      if (zone.placedTileId) {
408	        const ejectedTileId = zone.placedTileId;
409	        const isVirtual = ejectedTileId.startsWith('typed-');
410	        return {
411	          ...state,
412	          // If the ejected tile was mid-drag, clear drag state so the bank
413	          // hole disappears immediately rather than waiting for the drag to end.
414	          dragActiveTileId:
415	            state.dragActiveTileId === ejectedTileId
416	              ? null
417	              : state.dragActiveTileId,
418	          allTiles: isVirtual
419	            ? state.allTiles.filter((t) => t.id !== ejectedTileId)
420	            : state.allTiles,
421	          zones: state.zones.map((z, i) =>
422	            i === action.zoneIndex
423	              ? {
424	                  ...z,
425	                  placedTileId: null,
426	                  isWrong: false,
427	                  isLocked: false,
428	                }
429	              : z,
430	          ),
431	          bankTileIds: isVirtual
432	            ? state.bankTileIds
433	            : [...state.bankTileIds, ejectedTileId],
434	          // Move cursor to the ejected slot
435	          activeSlotIndex: action.zoneIndex,
436	        };
437	      }
438	
439	      return {
440	        ...state,
441	        zones: state.zones.map((z, i) =>
442	          i === action.zoneIndex
443	            ? {
444	                ...z,
445	                placedTileId: null,
446	                isWrong: false,
447	                isLocked: false,
448	              }
449	            : z,
450	        ),
451	        // Move cursor to the ejected slot
452	        activeSlotIndex: action.zoneIndex,
453	      };
454	    }
455	
456	    case 'ADVANCE_ROUND': {
457	      return {
458	        ...state,
459	        allTiles: action.tiles,
460	        bankTileIds: action.tiles.map((t: TileItem) => t.id),
461	        zones: action.zones,
462	        activeSlotIndex: 0,
463	        phase: 'playing',
464	        roundIndex: state.roundIndex + 1,
465	        retryCount: 0,
466	      };
467	    }
468	
469	    case 'ADVANCE_LEVEL': {
470	      return {
471	        ...state,
472	        allTiles: action.tiles,
473	        bankTileIds: action.tiles.map((t: TileItem) => t.id),
474	        zones: action.zones,
475	        activeSlotIndex: 0,
476	        phase: 'playing',
477	        roundIndex: 0,
478	        levelIndex: state.levelIndex + 1,
479	      };
480	    }
481	
482	    case 'COMPLETE_GAME': {
483	      return { ...state, phase: 'game-over' };
484	    }
485	
486	    case 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE': {
487	      return {
488	        ...state,
489	        dragActiveTileId: action.tileId,
490	        dragHoverZoneIndex:
491	          action.tileId === null ? null : state.dragHoverZoneIndex,
492	        dragHoverBankTileId:
493	          action.tileId === null ? null : state.dragHoverBankTileId,
494	      };
495	    }
496	
497	    case 'SET_DRAG_HOVER': {
498	      return { ...state, dragHoverZoneIndex: action.zoneIndex };
499	    }
500	
501	    case 'SET_DRAG_HOVER_BANK': {
502	      return { ...state, dragHoverBankTileId: action.tileId };
503	    }
504	
505	    case 'SWAP_SLOT_BANK': {
506	      const zone = state.zones[action.zoneIndex];
507	      if (!zone?.placedTileId) return state;
508	      if (!state.bankTileIds.includes(action.bankTileId)) return state;
509	
510	      const slotTileId = zone.placedTileId;
511	      const newBankTileIds = [
512	        ...state.bankTileIds.filter((id) => id !== action.bankTileId),
513	        slotTileId,
514	      ];
515	      const newZones = state.zones.map((z, i) =>
516	        i === action.zoneIndex
517	          ? {
518	              ...z,
519	              placedTileId: action.bankTileId,
520	              isWrong: false,
521	              isLocked: false,
522	            }
523	          : z,
524	      );
525	      return {
526	        ...state,
527	        bankTileIds: newBankTileIds,
528	        zones: newZones,
529	        dragActiveTileId: null,
530	        dragHoverBankTileId: null,
531	      };
532	    }
533	
534	    case 'SET_ACTIVE_SLOT': {
535	      const clamped = Math.max(
536	        0,
537	        Math.min(action.zoneIndex, state.zones.length - 1),
538	      );
539	      return { ...state, activeSlotIndex: clamped };
540	    }
541	
542	    default: {
543	      return state;
544	    }
545	  }
546	}
547
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./worktrees/276-fast-tap-queue/src/components/answer-game/useTileEvaluation.ts`

```text
1	import { nanoid } from 'nanoid';
2	import { useCallback } from 'react';
3	import { useAnswerGameContext } from './useAnswerGameContext';
4	import { useAnswerGameDispatch } from './useAnswerGameDispatch';
5	import { playSound } from '@/lib/audio/AudioFeedback';
6	import { getGameEventBus } from '@/lib/game-event-bus';
7	import { resolveSkin } from '@/lib/skin';
8	
9	export interface TileEvaluation {
10	  placeTile: (tileId: string, zoneIndex: number) => void;
11	  /**
12	   * Place a free-typed value into a slot. Creates a virtual tile when
13	   * no matching bank tile exists. Used with lock-manual / lock-auto-eject
14	   * so the user sees immediate wrong-tile feedback for any keystroke.
15	   */
16	  typeTile: (value: string, zoneIndex: number) => void;
17	}
18	
19	export function useTileEvaluation(): TileEvaluation {
20	  const state = useAnswerGameContext();
21	  const dispatch = useAnswerGameDispatch();
22	  const skin = resolveSkin(state.config.gameId, state.config.skin);
23	
24	  const placeTile = useCallback(
25	    (tileId: string, zoneIndex: number) => {
26	      const tile = state.allTiles.find((t) => t.id === tileId);
27	      const zone = state.zones[zoneIndex];
28	      if (!tile || !zone) return;
29	
30	      const correct = tile.value === zone.expectedValue;
31	      if (!skin.suppressDefaultSounds) {
32	        playSound(correct ? 'correct' : 'wrong', 0.8);
33	      }
34	      dispatch({ type: 'PLACE_TILE', tileId, zoneIndex });
35	
36	      getGameEventBus().emit({
37	        type: 'game:evaluate',
38	        gameId: state.config.gameId,
39	        sessionId: '',
40	        profileId: '',
41	        timestamp: Date.now(),
42	        roundIndex: state.roundIndex,
43	        answer: tileId,
44	        correct,
45	        nearMiss: false,
46	        zoneIndex,
47	      });
48	    },
49	    [state, dispatch, skin],
50	  );
51	
52	  const typeTile = useCallback(
53	    (value: string, zoneIndex: number) => {
54	      const zone = state.zones[zoneIndex];
55	      if (!zone) return;
56	
57	      const correct =
58	        value.toLowerCase() === zone.expectedValue.toLowerCase();
59	      if (!skin.suppressDefaultSounds) {
60	        playSound(correct ? 'correct' : 'wrong', 0.8);
61	      }
62	      dispatch({
63	        type: 'TYPE_TILE',
64	        tileId: `typed-${nanoid()}`,
65	        value,
66	        zoneIndex,
67	      });
68	
69	      getGameEventBus().emit({
70	        type: 'game:evaluate',
71	        gameId: state.config.gameId,
72	        sessionId: '',
73	        profileId: '',
74	        timestamp: Date.now(),
75	        roundIndex: state.roundIndex,
76	        answer: value,
77	        correct,
78	        nearMiss: false,
79	        zoneIndex,
80	      });
81	    },
82	    [state, dispatch, skin],
83	  );
84	
85	  return { placeTile, typeTile };
86	}
87
```

 `./worktrees/276-fast-tap-queue/docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-01-fast-tap-queue.md`

```text
1	# Fast-Tap Queue Implementation Plan
2	
3	> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.
4	
5	**Goal:** Fix false error bounces on rapid Android taps by pre-validating tiles at the bank and using a ref-based pending-placements queue to prevent stale-closure races.
6	
7	**Architecture:** A module-scoped `pendingPlacements` ref acts as a write-ahead log so concurrent taps see each other's claimed slots without waiting for React's batched re-render. Wrong tiles are caught at the bank (pre-validation) instead of traveling to a slot and bouncing back. A new `REJECT_TAP` reducer action tracks retries without zone mutations.
8	
9	**Tech Stack:** React 19, TypeScript, Vitest, @testing-library/react
10	
11	**Spec:** `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-01-fast-tap-queue-design.md`
12	
13	## Spec Delta
14	
15	**Red flash styling — inline styles instead of CSS class:** The spec says
16	"Add the `.is-wrong` styles to the existing DraggableTile CSS module." However,
17	there is no DraggableTile CSS module — bank tiles use inline styles via
18	`tileStyle()` (which sets `background: linear-gradient(...)`) and Tailwind
19	utility classes. A CSS class cannot override inline styles without `!important`.
20	This plan uses direct `el.style` assignment and `animationend` cleanup instead,
21	achieving the same visual result (skin-wrong-bg/border flash for shake duration)
22	without needing `!important` hacks or a new CSS module.
23	
24	---
25	
26	## File Structure
27	
28	### Modified files
29	
30	| File                                                | Responsibility                                                                                     |
31	| --------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
32	| `src/components/answer-game/types.ts`               | Add `REJECT_TAP` to `AnswerGameAction` union                                                       |
33	| `src/types/game-events.ts`                          | Add `expected` field to `GameEvaluateEvent`                                                        |
34	| `src/components/answer-game/answer-game-reducer.ts` | Handle `REJECT_TAP` action                                                                         |
35	| `src/components/answer-game/useTileEvaluation.ts`   | Add `expected` to emits; dispatch `REJECT_TAP` for reject-mode wrong on drag; return `{ correct }` |
36	| `src/components/answer-game/useAutoNextSlot.ts`     | Pending queue, pre-validation, `PlaceResult` return type                                           |
37	| `src/components/answer-game/useDraggableTile.ts`    | Pre-validate on click with shake/sound feedback; drag-reject shake                                 |
38	
39	### Modified test files
40	
41	| File                                                     | Responsibility                                     |
42	| -------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------- |
43	| `src/components/answer-game/answer-game-reducer.test.ts` | `REJECT_TAP` handler tests                         |
44	| `src/components/answer-game/useTileEvaluation.test.tsx`  | `expected` field + reject-dispatch tests           |
45	| `src/components/answer-game/useAutoNextSlot.test.tsx`    | Pending queue, pre-validation, `PlaceResult` tests |
46	| `src/components/answer-game/useDraggableTile.test.tsx`   | Click reject path + drag-reject tests              |
47	
48	---
49	
50	## Task 1: Add REJECT_TAP action and expected field to types
51	
52	**Files:**
53	
54	- Modify: `src/components/answer-game/types.ts:101-121`
55	- Modify: `src/types/game-events.ts:51-58`
56	
57	- [ ] **Step 1: Add REJECT_TAP to AnswerGameAction union**
58	
59	In `src/components/answer-game/types.ts`, add to the union after the `SET_ACTIVE_SLOT` member (line 121):
60	
61	```typescript
62	  | { type: 'SET_ACTIVE_SLOT'; zoneIndex: number }

341	- [ ] **Step 2: Run tests to verify they fail**
342	
343	Run: `npx vitest run src/components/answer-game/useTileEvaluation.test.tsx`
344	
345	Expected: FAIL — `expected` field missing from emit, `placeTile` returns void, reject mode still dispatches `PLACE_TILE`.
346	
347	- [ ] **Step 3: Implement changes in useTileEvaluation.ts**
348	
349	Update the `TileEvaluation` interface:
350	
351	```typescript
352	export interface TileEvaluation {
353	  placeTile: (
354	    tileId: string,
355	    zoneIndex: number,
356	  ) => { correct: boolean };
357	  typeTile: (value: string, zoneIndex: number) => void;
358	}
359	```
360	
361	Update `placeTile` implementation:
362	
363	```typescript
364	const placeTile = useCallback(
365	  (tileId: string, zoneIndex: number): { correct: boolean } => {
366	    const tile = state.allTiles.find((t) => t.id === tileId);
367	    const zone = state.zones[zoneIndex];
368	    if (!tile || !zone) return { correct: false };
369	
370	    const correct = tile.value === zone.expectedValue;
371	    if (!skin.suppressDefaultSounds) {
372	      playSound(correct ? 'correct' : 'wrong', 0.8);
373	    }
374	
375	    if (!correct && state.config.wrongTileBehavior === 'reject') {
376	      dispatch({ type: 'REJECT_TAP', tileId, zoneIndex });
377	    } else {
378	      dispatch({ type: 'PLACE_TILE', tileId, zoneIndex });
379	    }
380	
381	    getGameEventBus().emit({
382	      type: 'game:evaluate',
383	      gameId: state.config.gameId,
384	      sessionId: '',
385	      profileId: '',
386	      timestamp: Date.now(),
387	      roundIndex: state.roundIndex,
388	      answer: tileId,
389	      correct,
390	      nearMiss: false,
391	      zoneIndex,
392	      expected: zone.expectedValue,
393	    });
394	
395	    return { correct };
396	  },
397	  [state, dispatch, skin],
398	);
399	```
400	
401	Update `typeTile` to add `expected` to its emit:
402	
403	```typescript
404	getGameEventBus().emit({
405	  type: 'game:evaluate',
406	  gameId: state.config.gameId,
407	  sessionId: '',
408	  profileId: '',
409	  timestamp: Date.now(),
410	  roundIndex: state.roundIndex,
411	  answer: value,
412	  correct,
413	  nearMiss: false,
414	  zoneIndex,
415	  expected: zone.expectedValue,
416	});
417	```
418

421	Run: `npx vitest run src/components/answer-game/useTileEvaluation.test.tsx`
422	
423	Expected: PASS

440	## Task 4: Refactor useAutoNextSlot — pending queue and pre-validation
441	
442	**Files:**
443	
444	- Modify: `src/components/answer-game/useAutoNextSlot.ts`
445	- Test: `src/components/answer-game/useAutoNextSlot.test.tsx`
446	
447	This is the core fix. Changes:
448	
449	1. Module-scoped `pendingPlacements` array (write-ahead log)
450	2. `PlaceResult` return type: `{ placed: boolean; zoneIndex: number; rejected: boolean }`
451	3. Pre-validation against target slot's `expectedValue` (skipped for `lock-manual`)
452	4. Drain logic removes entries the reducer has applied
453	5. Clear on round transitions via `useEffect`
454	6. Remove `isWrong` early-return guard (superseded by pre-validation)
455	
456	- [ ] **Step 1: Write failing tests**
457	
458	Replace the entire content of `useAutoNextSlot.test.tsx` with:
459	
460	```typescript
461	import { act, renderHook } from '@testing-library/react';
462	import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest';
463	import { AnswerGameProvider } from './AnswerGameProvider';
464	import { useAnswerGameContext } from './useAnswerGameContext';
465	import { useAnswerGameDispatch } from './useAnswerGameDispatch';
466	import {
467	  clearPendingPlacements,
468	  useAutoNextSlot,
469	} from './useAutoNextSlot';
470	import type { AnswerGameConfig, AnswerZone, TileItem } from './types';
471	import type { PlaceResult } from './useAutoNextSlot';
472	import type { ReactNode } from 'react';
473	
474	vi.mock('@/lib/game-event-bus', () => ({
475	  getGameEventBus: () => ({ emit: vi.fn(), subscribe: vi.fn() }),
476	}));
477	
478	vi.mock('@/lib/audio/AudioFeedback', () => ({
479	  playSound: vi.fn(),
480	}));
481	
482	const gameConfig: AnswerGameConfig = {
483	  gameId: 'test',
484	  inputMethod: 'drag',
485	  wrongTileBehavior: 'lock-auto-eject',
486	  tileBankMode: 'exact',
487	  totalRounds: 1,
488	  ttsEnabled: false,
489	};
490	
491	const tileItems: TileItem[] = [
492	  { id: 't1', label: 'C', value: 'C' },
493	  { id: 't2', label: 'A', value: 'A' },
494	  { id: 't3', label: 'T', value: 'T' },
495	];
496	
497	const answerZones: AnswerZone[] = [
498	  {
499	    id: 'z0',
500	    index: 0,
501	    expectedValue: 'C',
502	    placedTileId: null,
503	    isWrong: false,
504	    isLocked: false,
505	  },
506	  {
507	    id: 'z1',
508	    index: 1,
509	    expectedValue: 'A',
510	    placedTileId: null,
511	    isWrong: false,
512	    isLocked: false,
513	  },
514	  {
515	    id: 'z2',
516	    index: 2,
517	    expectedValue: 'T',
518	    placedTileId: null,
519	    isWrong: false,
520	    isLocked: false,
521	  },
522	];
523	
524	beforeEach(() => {
525	  clearPendingPlacements();
526	});
527	
528	function createWrapper(config: AnswerGameConfig) {
529	  const Wrapper = ({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) => (
530	    <AnswerGameProvider config={config}>{children}</AnswerGameProvider>
531	  );
532	  Wrapper.displayName = 'AutoNextSlotTestWrapper';
533	  return Wrapper;
534	}
535	
536	function useHarness(
537	  tiles: TileItem[] = tileItems,
538	  zones: AnswerZone[] = answerZones,
539	) {
540	  const dispatch = useAnswerGameDispatch();
541	  const state = useAnswerGameContext();
542	  if (state.zones.length === 0)
543	    dispatch({ type: 'INIT_ROUND', tiles, zones });
544	  const { placeInNextSlot } = useAutoNextSlot();
545	  return { state, placeInNextSlot };
546	}
547	
548	describe('useAutoNextSlot', () => {
549	  describe('basic placement', () => {
550	    it('places correct tile in activeSlotIndex zone', () => {
551	      const Wrapper = createWrapper(gameConfig);
552	      const { result } = renderHook(() => useHarness(), {
553	        wrapper: Wrapper,
554	      });
555	
556	      let res: PlaceResult | undefined;
557	      act(() => {
558	        res = result.current.placeInNextSlot('t1');
559	      });
560	
561	      expect(res).toEqual({ placed: true, zoneIndex: 0, rejected: false });
562	      expect(result.current.state.zones[0]?.placedTileId).toBe('t1');
563	    });
564	
565	    it('advances activeSlotIndex after correct placement', () => {
566	      const Wrapper = createWrapper(gameConfig);
567	      const { result } = renderHook(() => useHarness(), {
568	        wrapper: Wrapper,
569	      });
570	
571	      expect(result.current.state.activeSlotIndex).toBe(0);
572	      act(() => result.current.placeInNextSlot('t1'));
573	      expect(result.current.state.activeSlotIndex).toBe(1);
574	    });
575	
576	    it('skips locked zones when finding the next available slot', () => {
577	      const lockedZones: AnswerZone[] = [
578	        { ...answerZones[0], isLocked: true },
579	        answerZones[1],
580	        answerZones[2],
581	      ];
582	
583	      const Wrapper = createWrapper(gameConfig);
584	      const { result } = renderHook(
585	        () => useHarness(tileItems, lockedZones),
586	        { wrapper: Wrapper },

588	
589	      act(() => result.current.placeInNextSlot('t2'));

591	      expect(result.current.state.zones[1]?.placedTileId).toBe('t2');
592	    });
593	  });
594	
595	  describe('pre-validation', () => {
596	    it('rejects wrong tile in lock-auto-eject mode', () => {
597	      const Wrapper = createWrapper(gameConfig);
598	      const { result } = renderHook(() => useHarness(), {
599	        wrapper: Wrapper,
600	      });
601	
602	      let res: PlaceResult | undefined;
603	      act(() => {
604	        res = result.current.placeInNextSlot('t2');
605	      });

607	      expect(res).toEqual({ placed: false, zoneIndex: 0, rejected: true });

618	        wrapper: Wrapper,
619	      });

621	      let res: PlaceResult | undefined;

625	
626	      expect(res).toEqual({ placed: false, zoneIndex: 0, rejected: true });
627	      expect(result.current.state.zones[0]?.placedTileId).toBeNull();
628	    });
629	
630	    it('allows wrong tile through in lock-manual mode (no pre-validation)', () => {
631	      const manualConfig: AnswerGameConfig = {
632	        ...gameConfig,
633	        wrongTileBehavior: 'lock-manual',
634	      };
635	      const Wrapper = createWrapper(manualConfig);

638	      });

643	      });
644	
645	      expect(res).toEqual({ placed: true, zoneIndex: 0, rejected: false });
646	      expect(result.current.state.zones[0]?.placedTileId).toBe('t2');
647	    });
648	  });
649	
650	  describe('pending placements queue', () => {
651	    it('prevents double-placement on rapid taps (stale closure fix)', () => {
652	      const Wrapper = createWrapper(gameConfig);
653	      const { result } = renderHook(() => useHarness(), {
654	        wrapper: Wrapper,
655	      });
656	
657	      act(() => {
658	        result.current.placeInNextSlot('t1');
659	        result.current.placeInNextSlot('t2');

662	      expect(result.current.state.zones[0]?.placedTileId).toBe('t1');
663	      expect(result.current.state.zones[1]?.placedTileId).toBe('t2');
664	    });
665	
666	    it('handles three rapid correct taps', () => {
667	      const Wrapper = createWrapper(gameConfig);
668	      const { result } = renderHook(() => useHarness(), {
669	        wrapper: Wrapper,
670	      });
671	
672	      act(() => {
673	        result.current.placeInNextSlot('t1');
674	        result.current.placeInNextSlot('t2');
675	        result.current.placeInNextSlot('t3');
676	      });
677	
678	      expect(result.current.state.zones[0]?.placedTileId).toBe('t1');
679	      expect(result.current.state.zones[1]?.placedTileId).toBe('t2');

681	    });
682	  });
683	
684	  describe('wrap-around', () => {
685	    it('wraps around to fill earlier empty slots', () => {
686	      const threeZones: AnswerZone[] = [
687	        { ...answerZones[0], placedTileId: null },
688	        { ...answerZones[1], placedTileId: 't2' },
689	        { ...answerZones[2], placedTileId: null },
690	      ];
691	
692	      const Wrapper = createWrapper(gameConfig);
693	
694	      function useHarnessWrap() {
695	        const dispatch = useAnswerGameDispatch();
696	        const state = useAnswerGameContext();

698	          dispatch({

700	            tiles: tileItems,

702	          });
703	          dispatch({ type: 'PLACE_TILE', tileId: 't2', zoneIndex: 1 });

711	      });

713	      act(() => result.current.placeInNextSlot('t3'));

717	    });
718	  });
719	
720	  describe('isWrong guard removal', () => {
721	    it('places correct tile in next slot even when active slot is wrong (lock-auto-eject drag)', () => {
722	      const wrongZones: AnswerZone[] = [

732	
733	      const tilesWithX: TileItem[] = [
734	        ...tileItems,
735	        { id: 'tX', label: 'X', value: 'X' },
736	      ];
737	
738	      const Wrapper = createWrapper(gameConfig);
739	      const { result } = renderHook(
740	        () => useHarness(tilesWithX, wrongZones),
741	        { wrapper: Wrapper },
742	      );
743	
744	      let res: PlaceResult | undefined;
745	      act(() => {
746	        res = result.current.placeInNextSlot('t2');
747	      });
748	
749	      expect(res).toEqual({ placed: true, zoneIndex: 1, rejected: false });
750	      expect(result.current.state.zones[1]?.placedTileId).toBe('t2');
751	    });
752	  });
753	});
754	```

761	
762	- [ ] **Step 3: Implement the refactored useAutoNextSlot**
763	
764	Replace the entire content of `src/components/answer-game/useAutoNextSlot.ts`:
765	
766	```typescript
767	import { useCallback, useEffect } from 'react';
768	import { useAnswerGameContext } from './useAnswerGameContext';
769	import { useTileEvaluation } from './useTileEvaluation';
770	
771	export interface PlaceResult {
772	  placed: boolean;
773	  zoneIndex: number;
774	  rejected: boolean;
775	}
776	
777	export interface AutoNextSlot {
778	  placeInNextSlot: (tileId: string) => PlaceResult;
779	}
780	
781	let pendingPlacements: Array<{ tileId: string; zoneIndex: number }> =
782	  [];
783	
784	export const clearPendingPlacements = (): void => {
785	  pendingPlacements = [];
786	};
787	
788	export const useAutoNextSlot = (): AutoNextSlot => {
789	  const state = useAnswerGameContext();
790	  const { zones, activeSlotIndex, config, allTiles, roundIndex } =
791	    state;
792	  const { placeTile } = useTileEvaluation();
793	
794	  useEffect(() => {
795	    clearPendingPlacements();
796	  }, [roundIndex]);
797	
798	  const placeInNextSlot = useCallback(
799	    (tileId: string): PlaceResult => {
800	      pendingPlacements = pendingPlacements.filter(
801	        (entry) =>
802	          zones[entry.zoneIndex]?.placedTileId !== entry.tileId,
803	      );
804	
805	      const claimedZones = new Set(
806	        pendingPlacements.map((e) => e.zoneIndex),
807	      );
808	
809	      const isAvailable = (i: number) =>
810	        zones[i] &&
811	        !zones[i].placedTileId &&
812	        !zones[i].isLocked &&
813	        !claimedZones.has(i);
814	
815	      let targetIndex = -1;
816	      for (let i = activeSlotIndex; i < zones.length; i++) {
817	        if (isAvailable(i)) {
818	          targetIndex = i;
819	          break;
820	        }
821	      }
822	      if (targetIndex === -1) {
823	        for (let i = 0; i < activeSlotIndex; i++) {
824	          if (isAvailable(i)) {
825	            targetIndex = i;
826	            break;
827	          }
828	        }
829	      }
830	
831	      if (targetIndex === -1) {
832	        return { placed: false, zoneIndex: -1, rejected: false };
833	      }
834	
835	      if (config.wrongTileBehavior !== 'lock-manual') {
836	        const tile = allTiles.find((t) => t.id === tileId);
837	        if (tile && tile.value !== zones[targetIndex].expectedValue) {
838	          return {
839	            placed: false,
840	            zoneIndex: targetIndex,
841	            rejected: true,
842	          };
843	        }
844	      }
845	
846	      pendingPlacements.push({ tileId, zoneIndex: targetIndex });
847	      placeTile(tileId, targetIndex);
848	      return { placed: true, zoneIndex: targetIndex, rejected: false };
849	    },
850	    [
851	      zones,
852	      activeSlotIndex,
853	      config.wrongTileBehavior,
854	      allTiles,
855	      placeTile,
856	    ],
857	  );
858	
859	  return { placeInNextSlot };
860	};
861	```
862

1118	const handleClick = () => {
1119	  if (ref.current?.classList.contains('animate-shake')) return;
1120	
1121	  speakTile(tile.label);
1122	  const result = placeInNextSlot(tile.id);
1123	
1124	  if (result.rejected && ref.current) {
1125	    triggerShake(ref.current);
1126	    const el = ref.current;
1127	    el.style.background = 'var(--skin-wrong-bg)';
1128	    el.style.borderColor = 'var(--skin-wrong-border)';
1129	    el.addEventListener(
1130	      'animationend',
1131	      () => {
1132	        el.style.background = '';
1133	        el.style.borderColor = '';
1134	      },
1135	      { once: true },
1136	    );
1137	
1138	    if (!skin.suppressDefaultSounds) {
1139	      playSound('wrong', 0.8);
1140	    }
1141	
1142	    dispatch({
1143	      type: 'REJECT_TAP',
1144	      tileId: tile.id,
1145	      zoneIndex: result.zoneIndex,
1146	    });
1147	
1148	    getGameEventBus().emit({
1149	      type: 'game:evaluate',
1150	      gameId: state.config.gameId,
1151	      sessionId: '',
1152	      profileId: '',
1153	      timestamp: Date.now(),
1154	      roundIndex: state.roundIndex,
1155	      answer: tile.id,
1156	      correct: false,
1157	      nearMiss: false,
1158	      zoneIndex: result.zoneIndex,
1159	      expected: state.zones[result.zoneIndex]?.expectedValue ?? '',
1160	    });
1161	  }
1162	};
1163	```

1250	
1251	Add the drag-reject test:
1252	
1253	```typescript
1254	describe('touch drag reject path', () => {
1255	  it('calls triggerShake on bank tile when drag-drop is rejected in reject mode', () => {
1256	    mockWrongTileBehavior = 'reject';
1257	    mockPlaceTile.mockReturnValue({ correct: false });
1258	
1259	    const tile = { id: 't2', label: 'X', value: 'X' };
1260	    const { result } = renderHook(() => useDraggableTile(tile));
1261	
1262	    const button = document.createElement('button');
1263	    Object.defineProperty(result.current.ref, 'current', {
1264	      value: button,
1265	      writable: true,
1266	    });
1267	
1268	    const onDrop = capturedTouchDragOptions.onDrop as (
1269	      tileId: string,
1270	      zoneIndex: number,
1271	    ) => void;
1272	    act(() => onDrop('t2', 0));
1273	
1274	    expect(mockTriggerShake).toHaveBeenCalledWith(button);
1275	
1276	    mockWrongTileBehavior = 'lock-auto-eject';
1277	  });
1278	
1279	  it('does not shake when wrong tile is dropped in lock-auto-eject mode', () => {
1280	    mockPlaceTile.mockReturnValue({ correct: false });
1281	
1282	    const tile = { id: 't2', label: 'X', value: 'X' };
1283	    renderHook(() => useDraggableTile(tile));
1284	
1285	    const onDrop = capturedTouchDragOptions.onDrop as (
1286	      tileId: string,
1287	      zoneIndex: number,
1288	    ) => void;
1289	    act(() => onDrop('t2', 0));
1290	
1291	    expect(mockTriggerShake).not.toHaveBeenCalled();
1292	  });
1293	});
1294	```
1295	
1296	> **Note:** The `capturedTouchDragOptions` approach captures the callbacks
1297	> `useDraggableTile` passes to `useTouchDrag`. The `stateRef` used in
1298	> `onDrop` (line 29 of useDraggableTile.ts: `const stateRef = useRef(state)`)
1299	> ensures `wrongTileBehavior` reads the current value even inside a stale
1300	> closure. The `requestAnimationFrame` wrapper in the implementation defers
1301	> the shake until after React re-renders the tile at full opacity.
1302

1371	
1372	- [ ] **Step 1: Run full test suite**

1389	
1390	- [ ] **Step 4: Manual verification checklist**
1391	
1392	Verify against the spec's behavior matrix:
1393	
1394	| Mode              | Input                      | Expected behavior                                   |
1395	| ----------------- | -------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------- |
1396	| `lock-auto-eject` | Tap wrong tile             | Tile shakes in bank, wrong sound, no slot placement |
1397	| `lock-auto-eject` | Tap correct tile           | Tile placed in slot, correct sound                  |
1398	| `lock-auto-eject` | Rapid correct taps (C-A-T) | All three placed correctly, no false bounces        |
1399	| `lock-manual`     | Tap wrong tile             | Tile goes to slot (unchanged behavior)              |
1400	| `reject`          | Tap wrong tile             | Tile shakes in bank, wrong sound                    |
1401	| `reject`          | Drag wrong tile            | Tile returns to bank, wrong sound, shake            |
1402	| `lock-auto-eject` | Drag wrong tile            | Tile lands in slot, auto-ejects (unchanged)         |
1403

```text
1	import { useCallback } from 'react';
2	import { useAnswerGameContext } from './useAnswerGameContext';
3	import { useTileEvaluation } from './useTileEvaluation';
4	
5	export interface AutoNextSlot {
6	  placeInNextSlot: (tileId: string) => void;
7	}
8	
9	export const useAutoNextSlot = (): AutoNextSlot => {
10	  const { activeSlotIndex, zones } = useAnswerGameContext();
11	  const { placeTile } = useTileEvaluation();
12	
13	  const placeInNextSlot = useCallback(
14	    (tileId: string) => {
15	      // Guard: if the active slot is in a wrong state (e.g. a wrong tile was
16	      // just placed with lock-auto-eject), block further placements until it
17	      // clears. This prevents double/triple taps from skipping past the slot.
18	      if (zones[activeSlotIndex]?.isWrong) return;
19	
20	      // Look for the next available slot from activeSlotIndex forward...
21	      let targetIndex = zones.findIndex(
22	        (z, i) =>
23	          i >= activeSlotIndex &&
24	          z.placedTileId === null &&
25	          !z.isLocked,
26	      );
27	
28	      // ...and wrap around if needed. This handles out-of-order placements
29	      // (e.g. via drag) where earlier slots were left empty and activeSlotIndex
30	      // has already advanced past them.
31	      if (targetIndex === -1) {
32	        targetIndex = zones.findIndex(
33	          (z) => z.placedTileId === null && !z.isLocked,
34	        );
35	      }
36	
37	      if (targetIndex === -1) return;
38	      placeTile(tileId, targetIndex);
39	    },
40	    [placeTile, activeSlotIndex, zones],
41	  );
42	
43	  return { placeInNextSlot };
44	};
45
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./worktrees/276-fast-tap-queue/src/components/answer-game/useDraggableTile.ts`

```text
1	import {
2	  draggable,
3	  dropTargetForElements,
4	} from '@atlaskit/pragmatic-drag-and-drop/element/adapter';
5	import { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
6	import { useAnswerGameContext } from './useAnswerGameContext';
7	import { useAnswerGameDispatch } from './useAnswerGameDispatch';
8	import { useAutoNextSlot } from './useAutoNextSlot';
9	import { useGameTTS } from './useGameTTS';
10	import { useTileEvaluation } from './useTileEvaluation';
11	import { useTouchDrag } from './useTouchDrag';
12	import type { TileItem } from './types';
13	import type { TouchDragHandlers } from './useTouchDrag';
14	import type { RefObject } from 'react';
15	import { getGameEventBus } from '@/lib/game-event-bus';
16	
17	export interface DraggableTile extends TouchDragHandlers {
18	  ref: RefObject<HTMLButtonElement | null>;
19	  handleClick: () => void;
20	}
21	
22	export const useDraggableTile = (tile: TileItem): DraggableTile => {
23	  const ref = useRef<HTMLButtonElement>(null);
24	  const dispatch = useAnswerGameDispatch();
25	  const state = useAnswerGameContext();
26	  // Mirror state in a ref so onDragStart can read current gameId/roundIndex
27	  // without adding `state` to the draggable() effect's deps (which would
28	  // re-subscribe pragmatic-drag-and-drop on every game-state change).
29	  const stateRef = useRef(state);
30	  const { placeInNextSlot } = useAutoNextSlot();
31	  const { speakTile } = useGameTTS();
32	  const speakTileRef = useRef(speakTile);
33	  const { placeTile } = useTileEvaluation();
34	
35	  useEffect(() => {
36	    speakTileRef.current = speakTile;
37	  }, [speakTile]);
38	
39	  useEffect(() => {
40	    stateRef.current = state;
41	  }, [state]);
42	
43	  // HTML5 DnD — desktop
44	  // SET_DRAG_ACTIVE on start so slots can show a preview while the bank tile
45	  // is being dragged. Cleared on drop (slot handler also clears it on success,
46	  // so the double-clear here is idempotent).
47	  // Also registered as a drop target so slot tiles can be dropped onto this
48	  // bank tile to trigger SWAP_SLOT_BANK. onDragEnter sets the hover preview;
49	  // hover is cleared by SET_DRAG_ACTIVE(null) when the drag ends.
50	  useEffect(() => {
51	    const element = ref.current;
52	    if (!element) return;
53	    const cleanupDraggable = draggable({
54	      element,
55	      getInitialData: () => ({ tileId: tile.id }),
56	      onDragStart: () => {
57	        speakTileRef.current(tile.label);
58	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE', tileId: tile.id });
59	        getGameEventBus().emit({
60	          type: 'game:drag-start',
61	          gameId: stateRef.current.config.gameId,
62	          sessionId: '',
63	          profileId: '',
64	          timestamp: Date.now(),
65	          roundIndex: stateRef.current.roundIndex,
66	          tileId: tile.id,
67	        });
68	      },
69	      onDrop: () => dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE', tileId: null }),
70	    });
71	    const cleanupDropTarget = dropTargetForElements({
72	      element,
73	      getData: () => ({ bankTileId: tile.id, isBankTarget: true }),
74	      onDragEnter: () =>
75	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_HOVER_BANK', tileId: tile.id }),
76	      onDragLeave: () =>
77	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_HOVER_BANK', tileId: null }),
78	    });
79	    return () => {
80	      cleanupDraggable();
81	      cleanupDropTarget();
82	    };
83	  }, [tile.id, tile.label, dispatch]);
84	
85	  // Pointer-events drag — touch / mobile
86	  const { onPointerDown, onPointerMove, onPointerUp, onPointerCancel } =
87	    useTouchDrag({
88	      tileId: tile.id,
89	      label: tile.label,
90	      onDragStart: () => {
91	        speakTileRef.current(tile.label);
92	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE', tileId: tile.id });
93	        getGameEventBus().emit({
94	          type: 'game:drag-start',
95	          gameId: stateRef.current.config.gameId,
96	          sessionId: '',
97	          profileId: '',
98	          timestamp: Date.now(),
99	          roundIndex: stateRef.current.roundIndex,
100	          tileId: tile.id,
101	        });
102	      },
103	      onDragCancel: () =>
104	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE', tileId: null }),
105	      onDrop: (droppedTileId, zoneIndex) => {
106	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE', tileId: null });
107	        placeTile(droppedTileId, zoneIndex);
108	      },
109	      onDropOnBank: () =>
110	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE', tileId: null }),
111	      onDropOnBankTile: () =>
112	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_ACTIVE', tileId: null }),
113	      onHoverZone: (zoneIndex) => {
114	        dispatch({ type: 'SET_DRAG_HOVER', zoneIndex });
115	        if (zoneIndex !== null) {
116	          getGameEventBus().emit({
117	            type: 'game:drag-over-zone',
118	            gameId: stateRef.current.config.gameId,
119	            sessionId: '',
120	            profileId: '',
121	            timestamp: Date.now(),
122	            roundIndex: stateRef.current.roundIndex,
123	            zoneIndex,
124	          });
125	        }
126	      },
127	    });
128	
129	  const handleClick = () => {
130	    speakTile(tile.label);
131	    placeInNextSlot(tile.id);
132	  };
133	
134	  return {
135	    ref,
136	    handleClick,
137	    onPointerDown,
138	    onPointerMove,
139	    onPointerUp,
140	    onPointerCancel,
141	  };
142	};
143
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./worktrees/276-fast-tap-queue/docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-01-fast-tap-queue-design.md`

```text
1	# Fast-Tap Queue & Pre-Validation Design
2	
3	**Issue:** [#276](https://github.com/leocaseiro/base-skill/issues/276)
4	**Date:** 2026-05-01
5	
6	## Problem
7	
8	On Android touch devices, tapping letter tiles quickly in the correct order
9	(e.g. C-A-T within ~100ms) causes false error bounces. React's click handlers
10	fire synchronously, but reducer dispatches are batched — the second tap reads
11	stale `activeSlotIndex` and `zones` from its closure before the first
12	`PLACE_TILE` has flushed.
13	
14	Mouse clicks cannot reproduce the bug (insufficient speed). Drag-and-drop is
15	unaffected (user targets a specific slot).
16	
17	## Solution: Pre-Validation at the Bank + Input Buffer
18	
19	### Pre-validation on tap/click
20	
21	When a bank tile is tapped (not dragged), check the tile's value against the
22	target slot's `expectedValue` **before** dispatching `PLACE_TILE`.
23	Pre-validation reads `expectedValue` from `zones[computedTargetIndex]`, where
24	`computedTargetIndex` is the next empty slot accounting for pending placements
25	in the ref (not the stale `activeSlotIndex` from the closure). Behavior
26	varies by `wrongTileBehavior`:
27	
28	| `wrongTileBehavior` | Tap/click (new)                                          | Drag (unchanged)                                    |
29	| ------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------- |
30	| `lock-auto-eject`   | Pre-validate at bank — wrong tile shakes in bank         | Lands in slot, auto-ejects after delay              |
31	| `lock-manual`       | **No change** — wrong tile goes to slot, stays locked    | Same — no change                                    |
32	| `reject`            | Shake + wrong sound + red flash on bank tile (all input) | Same shake + wrong sound + red flash (new feedback) |
33	
34	For `reject` mode, the feedback applies to **all input methods** (tap, click,
35	and drag). The reducer already silently discards wrong tiles in this mode
36	(lines 119-125 of `answer-game-reducer.ts`); we add visual+audio feedback
37	where there was none.
38	
39	### Input buffer for rapid correct taps
40	
41	A shared ref-based pending-placements queue prevents the stale-closure race.
42	The ref must be shared across all hook instances — either lifted to
43	`AnswerGameProvider` context or stored at module scope — so that concurrent
44	taps from different tile components see each other's pending claims.
45	
46	- Maintain a `pendingPlacements` ref (`Array<{ tileId: string; zoneIndex: number }>`)
47	- When `placeInNextSlot` is called, compute the target slot accounting for
48	  both current `zones` state AND pending placements in the ref
49	- Push the placement into the ref, then dispatch `PLACE_TILE`
50	- Drain condition: on re-render, remove entries where
51	  `zones[entry.zoneIndex].placedTileId === entry.tileId` (the reducer has
52	  applied them)
53	- Clear the ref entirely on `INIT_ROUND`, `ADVANCE_ROUND`, and
54	  `ADVANCE_LEVEL` to prevent stale entries across rounds
55	
56	The ref is synchronous (no React batching delay) — a write-ahead log that
57	lets the second tap see slot 0 is claimed and correctly target slot 1. No
58	`flushSync`, no debounce timers.
59	
60	### Bank tile shake animation
61	
62	`triggerShake` from `slot-animations.ts` is called on the bank tile's
63	`<button>` ref when pre-validation rejects a tap. Same `animate-shake` CSS
64	class (300ms oscillate-X) — no new keyframes.
65	
66	For the red flash: briefly apply a CSS class (`is-wrong`) to the bank tile
67	button for the duration of the shake animation (~300ms), using the existing
68	`--skin-wrong-bg` and `--skin-wrong-border` CSS variables so it matches the
69	slot wrong-tile styling. Remove the class on `animationend`. Add the
70	`.is-wrong` styles to the existing DraggableTile CSS module (co-located with
71	the component) — no new stylesheet needed.
72	
73	**Throttle on rapid re-tap:** If the bank tile already has `animate-shake`
74	(a shake is in progress), ignore subsequent taps. This prevents restarting
75	the animation mid-cycle, which would orphan the `animationend` listener and
76	leave the `is-wrong` class permanently applied.
77	
78	`useAutoNextSlot.placeInNextSlot` returns
79	`{ placed: boolean; zoneIndex: number; rejected: boolean }` instead of
80	`void`, so callers can branch on the outcome.
81	
82	Flow in `useDraggableTile.handleClick`:
83	
84	1. `speakTile(tile.label)` (unchanged)
85	2. Call `placeInNextSlot(tile.id)` — pre-validates tile value against
86	   `zones[computedTargetIndex].expectedValue`
87	3. If `rejected` and not `lock-manual`: `triggerShake(ref.current)`, play
88	   wrong sound, dispatch `REJECT_TAP` with `zoneIndex` from the result
89	4. If `placed`: tile is pushed to pending ref and `PLACE_TILE` dispatched
90	
91	Pre-validation supersedes the existing `isWrong` early-return guard
92	(`if (zones[activeSlotIndex]?.isWrong) return`) for tap/click paths — the
93	tile is checked at the bank before reaching the reducer. The `isWrong` guard
94	remains active for drag and `lock-manual` paths where tiles still land in
95	slots.
96	
97	### New `REJECT_TAP` reducer action
98	
99	```typescript
100	{
101	  type: 'REJECT_TAP';
102	  tileId: string;
103	  zoneIndex: number;
104	}
105	```
106	
107	Increments `retryCount` only. No zone mutations, no bank changes, no
108	`activeSlotIndex` movement.
109	
110	### Add `expected` field to `game:evaluate` events
111	
112	Add `expected: string` to the `GameEvaluateEvent` type, populated from
113	`zone.expectedValue` at all emit sites:
114	
115	- `useTileEvaluation.placeTile`
116	- `useTileEvaluation.typeTile`
117	- Pre-validation reject path in `useDraggableTile.handleClick`
118	
119	Non-breaking additive change. No IndexedDB migration needed — `game:evaluate`
120	events are in-memory only, and session history payloads use
121	`additionalProperties: true`.
122	
123	Provides the confusion pair (`answer` vs `expected`) for future SRS (Anki
124	algorithm) implementation.
125	
126	## Files to modify
127	
128	| File                                                | Change                                                                                     |
129	| --------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
130	| `src/components/answer-game/types.ts`               | Add `REJECT_TAP` action                                                                    |
131	| `src/types/game-events.ts`                          | Add `expected` field to `GameEvaluateEvent`                                                |
132	| `src/components/answer-game/answer-game-reducer.ts` | Handle `REJECT_TAP` (increment retryCount)                                                 |
133	| `src/components/answer-game/useAutoNextSlot.ts`     | Add pending-placements ref, pre-validation logic                                           |
134	| `src/components/answer-game/useDraggableTile.ts`    | Pre-validate on click, shake on reject, emit event                                         |
135	| `src/components/answer-game/useTileEvaluation.ts`   | Add `expected` to all `game:evaluate` emits, add reject feedback for `reject` mode on drag |
136	
137	## Scope
138	
139	### In scope
140	
141	- Pre-validate tile on tap/click path (`lock-auto-eject` and `reject` modes)
142	- Full reject feedback (shake, sound, red flash) for `reject` mode on all
143	  input methods
144	- Ref-based pending queue to prevent stale-closure races on rapid correct taps
145	- Shake animation on bank tile for wrong tap
146	- `REJECT_TAP` reducer action
147	- `expected` field on `GameEvaluateEvent` at all emit sites
148	- Unit tests for new paths (pre-validation, queue, reducer action)
149	
150	### Not in scope
151	
152	- `lock-manual` tap behavior (unchanged — wrong tiles go to slot)
153	- `lock-manual` sequential wrong tile blocking (separate bug, tracked in
154	  [#280](https://github.com/leocaseiro/base-skill/issues/280))
155	- Keyboard/type input path (`typeTile`)
156	- SRS consumer implementation (future — this ensures the data shape is ready)
157	- iOS-specific investigation (fix is platform-agnostic)
158	
159	## Open Questions
160	
161	- **Screen reader announcements for rejected taps:** Should the shake +
162	  red flash be accompanied by an `aria-live` announcement (e.g. "Wrong
163	  tile") so screen reader users get equivalent feedback? Deferred from
164	  doc review — not blocking for initial implementation.
165
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-opus-4-6 2026-05-01 07:25:28Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>

```text
1	import { act, renderHook } from '@testing-library/react';
2	import {
3	  afterEach,
4	  beforeEach,
5	  describe,
6	  expect,
7	  it,
8	  vi,
9	} from 'vitest';
10	import { AnswerGameProvider } from './AnswerGameProvider';
11	import { useAnswerGameContext } from './useAnswerGameContext';
12	import { useAnswerGameDispatch } from './useAnswerGameDispatch';
13	import { useTileEvaluation } from './useTileEvaluation';
14	import type { AnswerGameConfig, AnswerZone, TileItem } from './types';
15	import type { ReactNode } from 'react';
16	import { playSound } from '@/lib/audio/AudioFeedback';
17	import { __resetSkinRegistryForTests, registerSkin } from '@/lib/skin';
18	
19	vi.mock('@/lib/game-event-bus', () => ({
20	  getGameEventBus: () => ({ emit: vi.fn(), subscribe: vi.fn() }),
21	}));
22	
23	vi.mock('@/lib/audio/AudioFeedback', () => ({
24	  playSound: vi.fn(),
25	  queueSound: vi.fn(),
26	  whenSoundEnds: vi.fn().mockImplementation(() => Promise.resolve()),
27	}));
28	
29	const baseConfig: AnswerGameConfig = {
30	  gameId: 'test',
31	  inputMethod: 'drag',
32	  wrongTileBehavior: 'lock-auto-eject',
33	  tileBankMode: 'exact',
34	  totalRounds: 1,
35	  ttsEnabled: false,
36	};
37	
38	const tiles: TileItem[] = [
39	  { id: 't1', label: 'C', value: 'C' },
40	  { id: 't2', label: 'X', value: 'X' },
41	];
42	
43	const zones: AnswerZone[] = [
44	  {
45	    id: 'z0',
46	    index: 0,
47	    expectedValue: 'C',
48	    placedTileId: null,
49	    isWrong: false,
50	    isLocked: false,
51	  },
52	];
53	
54	function createWrapper(config: AnswerGameConfig) {
55	  const Wrapper = ({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) => (
56	    <AnswerGameProvider config={config}>{children}</AnswerGameProvider>
57	  );
58	  Wrapper.displayName = 'AnswerGameTestWrapper';
59	  return Wrapper;
60	}
61	
62	function useTileEvaluationHarness() {
63	  const dispatch = useAnswerGameDispatch();
64	  const state = useAnswerGameContext();
65	  if (state.zones.length === 0) {
66	    dispatch({ type: 'INIT_ROUND', tiles, zones });
67	  }
68	  const { placeTile } = useTileEvaluation();
69	  return { state, placeTile };
70	}
71	
72	function useInitialisedEvaluation(_config: AnswerGameConfig) {
73	  const dispatch = useAnswerGameDispatch();
74	  const { zones: stateZones } = useAnswerGameContext();
75	  if (stateZones.length === 0) {
76	    dispatch({ type: 'INIT_ROUND', tiles, zones });
77	  }
78	  return useTileEvaluation();
79	}
80	
81	describe('useTileEvaluation', () => {
82	  beforeEach(() => {
83	    vi.useFakeTimers();
84	    vi.clearAllMocks();
85	  });
86	  afterEach(() => vi.useRealTimers());
87	
88	  it('plays "correct" sound on correct tile placement', () => {
89	    const { result } = renderHook(
90	      () => useInitialisedEvaluation(baseConfig),
91	      { wrapper: createWrapper(baseConfig) },
92	    );
93	    act(() => result.current.placeTile('t1', 0));
94	    expect(playSound).toHaveBeenCalledWith('correct', 0.8);
95	  });
96	
97	  it('plays "wrong" sound on incorrect tile placement', () => {
98	    const { result } = renderHook(() => useTileEvaluationHarness(), {
99	      wrapper: createWrapper(baseConfig),
100	    });
101	    act(() => result.current.placeTile('t2', 0));
102	    expect(playSound).toHaveBeenCalledWith('wrong', 0.8);
103	  });
104	
105	  it('correct placement: zone not marked wrong', () => {
106	    const { result } = renderHook(
107	      () => useInitialisedEvaluation(baseConfig),
108	      {
109	        wrapper: createWrapper(baseConfig),
110	      },
111	    );
112	    act(() => result.current.placeTile('t1', 0));
113	    expect(result.current.placeTile).toBeDefined();
114	  });
115	
116	  it('lock-auto-eject: wrong tile is placed and marked wrong (eject handled by slot)', () => {
117	    const { result } = renderHook(() => useTileEvaluationHarness(), {
118	      wrapper: createWrapper(baseConfig),
119	    });
120	
121	    act(() => result.current.placeTile('t2', 0));
122	    expect(result.current.state.zones[0]?.isWrong).toBe(true);
123	    // EJECT_TILE is now dispatched by useSlotBehavior, not useTileEvaluation,
124	    // so advancing time here should NOT clear the zone.
125	    act(() => vi.advanceTimersByTime(1000));
126	    expect(result.current.state.zones[0]?.isWrong).toBe(true);
127	  });
128	
129	  it('reject: no zone placement, only retryCount incremented', () => {
130	    const rejectConfig: AnswerGameConfig = {
131	      ...baseConfig,
132	      wrongTileBehavior: 'reject',
133	    };
134	
135	    const { result } = renderHook(() => useTileEvaluationHarness(), {
136	      wrapper: createWrapper(rejectConfig),
137	    });
138	
139	    act(() => result.current.placeTile('t2', 0));
140	    expect(result.current.state.zones[0]?.placedTileId).toBeNull();
141	    expect(result.current.state.retryCount).toBe(1);
142	  });
143	
144	  it('lock-manual: wrong tile stays until manually removed', () => {
145	    const manualConfig: AnswerGameConfig = {
146	      ...baseConfig,
147	      wrongTileBehavior: 'lock-manual',
148	    };
149	
150	    const { result } = renderHook(() => useTileEvaluationHarness(), {
151	      wrapper: createWrapper(manualConfig),
152	    });
153	
154	    act(() => result.current.placeTile('t2', 0));
155	    expect(result.current.state.zones[0]?.isWrong).toBe(true);
156	
157	    act(() => vi.advanceTimersByTime(2000));
158	    expect(result.current.state.zones[0]?.placedTileId).toBe('t2');
159	  });
160	
161	  it('skips default sound when skin.suppressDefaultSounds is true', () => {
162	    __resetSkinRegistryForTests();
163	    registerSkin('test', {
164	      id: 'silent',
165	      name: 'Silent',
166	      tokens: {},
167	      suppressDefaultSounds: true,
168	    });
169	
170	    const config: AnswerGameConfig = { ...baseConfig, skin: 'silent' };
171	    const { result } = renderHook(() => useTileEvaluationHarness(), {
172	      wrapper: createWrapper(config),
173	    });
174	
175	    vi.mocked(playSound).mockClear();
176	
177	    act(() => {
178	      result.current.placeTile('t1', 0);
179	    });
180	
181	    expect(playSound).not.toHaveBeenCalled();
182	  });
183	});

 `./worktrees/276-fast-tap-queue/docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-01-fast-tap-queue.md`

```text
1	# Fast-Tap Queue Implementation Plan
2	
3	> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.
4	
5	**Goal:** Fix false error bounces on rapid Android taps by pre-validating tiles at the bank and using a ref-based pending-placements queue to prevent stale-closure races.
6	
7	**Architecture:** A module-scoped `pendingPlacements` ref acts as a write-ahead log so concurrent taps see each other's claimed slots without waiting for React's batched re-render. Wrong tiles are caught at the bank (pre-validation) instead of traveling to a slot and bouncing back. A new `REJECT_TAP` reducer action tracks retries without zone mutations.
8	
9	**Tech Stack:** React 19, TypeScript, Vitest, @testing-library/react
10	
11	**Spec:** `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-01-fast-tap-queue-design.md`
12	
13	## Spec Delta
14	
15	**Red flash styling — inline styles instead of CSS class:** The spec says
16	"Add the `.is-wrong` styles to the existing DraggableTile CSS module." However,
17	there is no DraggableTile CSS module — bank tiles use inline styles via
18	`tileStyle()` (which sets `background: linear-gradient(...)`) and Tailwind
19	utility classes. A CSS class cannot override inline styles without `!important`.
20	This plan uses direct `el.style` assignment and `animationend` cleanup instead,
21	achieving the same visual result (skin-wrong-bg/border flash for shake duration)
22	without needing `!important` hacks or a new CSS module.
23	
24	---
25	
26	## File Structure
27	
28	### Modified files
29	
30	| File                                                | Responsibility                                                                                     |
31	| --------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
32	| `src/components/answer-game/types.ts`               | Add `REJECT_TAP` to `AnswerGameAction` union                                                       |
33	| `src/types/game-events.ts`                          | Add `expected` field to `GameEvaluateEvent`                                                        |
34	| `src/components/answer-game/answer-game-reducer.ts` | Handle `REJECT_TAP` action                                                                         |
35	| `src/components/answer-game/useTileEvaluation.ts`   | Add `expected` to emits; dispatch `REJECT_TAP` for reject-mode wrong on drag; return `{ correct }` |
36	| `src/components/answer-game/useAutoNextSlot.ts`     | Pending queue, pre-validation, `PlaceResult` return type                                           |
37	| `src/components/answer-game/useDraggableTile.ts`    | Pre-validate on click with shake/sound feedback; drag-reject shake                                 |
38

45	| `src/components/answer-game/useAutoNextSlot.test.tsx`    | Pending queue, pre-validation, `PlaceResult` tests |
46	| `src/components/answer-game/useDraggableTile.test.tsx`   | Click reject path + drag-reject tests              |

347	- [ ] **Step 3: Implement changes in useTileEvaluation.ts**
348	
349	Update the `TileEvaluation` interface:
350	
351	```typescript
352	export interface TileEvaluation {
353	  placeTile: (
354	    tileId: string,
355	    zoneIndex: number,
356	  ) => { correct: boolean };
357	  typeTile: (value: string, zoneIndex: number) => void;
358	}
359	```
360	
361	Update `placeTile` implementation:
362	
363	```typescript
364	const placeTile = useCallback(
365	  (tileId: string, zoneIndex: number): { correct: boolean } => {
366	    const tile = state.allTiles.find((t) => t.id === tileId);
367	    const zone = state.zones[zoneIndex];
368	    if (!tile || !zone) return { correct: false };
369	
370	    const correct = tile.value === zone.expectedValue;
371	    if (!skin.suppressDefaultSounds) {
372	      playSound(correct ? 'correct' : 'wrong', 0.8);
373	    }
374	
375	    if (!correct && state.config.wrongTileBehavior === 'reject') {
376	      dispatch({ type: 'REJECT_TAP', tileId, zoneIndex });
377	    } else {
378	      dispatch({ type: 'PLACE_TILE', tileId, zoneIndex });
379	    }
380	
381	    getGameEventBus().emit({
382	      type: 'game:evaluate',
383	      gameId: state.config.gameId,
384	      sessionId: '',
385	      profileId: '',
386	      timestamp: Date.now(),
387	      roundIndex: state.roundIndex,
388	      answer: tileId,
389	      correct,
390	      nearMiss: false,
391	      zoneIndex,
392	      expected: zone.expectedValue,
393	    });
394	
395	    return { correct };
396	  },
397	  [state, dispatch, skin],
398	);
399	```
400

402	
403	```typescript
404	getGameEventBus().emit({
405	  type: 'game:evaluate',
406	  gameId: state.config.gameId,
407	  sessionId: '',
408	  profileId: '',
409	  timestamp: Date.now(),
410	  roundIndex: state.roundIndex,
411	  answer: value,
412	  correct,
413	  nearMiss: false,
414	  zoneIndex,
415	  expected: zone.expectedValue,
416	});
417	```

445	- Test: `src/components/answer-game/useAutoNextSlot.test.tsx`
446	
447	This is the core fix. Changes:
448	
449	1. Module-scoped `pendingPlacements` array (write-ahead log)
450	2. `PlaceResult` return type: `{ placed: boolean; zoneIndex: number; rejected: boolean }`
451	3. Pre-validation against target slot's `expectedValue` (skipped for `lock-manual`)
452	4. Drain logic removes entries the reducer has applied
453	5. Clear on round transitions via `useEffect`
454	6. Remove `isWrong` early-return guard (superseded by pre-validation)
455

762	- [ ] **Step 3: Implement the refactored useAutoNextSlot**
763	
764	Replace the entire content of `src/components/answer-game/useAutoNextSlot.ts`:
765	
766	```typescript
767	import { useCallback, useEffect } from 'react';
768	import { useAnswerGameContext } from './useAnswerGameContext';
769	import { useTileEvaluation } from './useTileEvaluation';
770	
771	export interface PlaceResult {
772	  placed: boolean;
773	  zoneIndex: number;
774	  rejected: boolean;
775	}
776	
777	export interface AutoNextSlot {
778	  placeInNextSlot: (tileId: string) => PlaceResult;
779	}
780	
781	let pendingPlacements: Array<{ tileId: string; zoneIndex: number }> =
782	  [];
783	
784	export const clearPendingPlacements = (): void => {
785	  pendingPlacements = [];
786	};
787	
788	export const useAutoNextSlot = (): AutoNextSlot => {
789	  const state = useAnswerGameContext();
790	  const { zones, activeSlotIndex, config, allTiles, roundIndex } =
791	    state;
792	  const { placeTile } = useTileEvaluation();
793	
794	  useEffect(() => {
795	    clearPendingPlacements();
796	  }, [roundIndex]);
797	
798	  const placeInNextSlot = useCallback(
799	    (tileId: string): PlaceResult => {
800	      pendingPlacements = pendingPlacements.filter(
801	        (entry) =>
802	          zones[entry.zoneIndex]?.placedTileId !== entry.tileId,
803	      );
804	
805	      const claimedZones = new Set(
806	        pendingPlacements.map((e) => e.zoneIndex),
807	      );
808	
809	      const isAvailable = (i: number) =>
810	        zones[i] &&
811	        !zones[i].placedTileId &&
812	        !zones[i].isLocked &&
813	        !claimedZones.has(i);
814	
815	      let targetIndex = -1;
816	      for (let i = activeSlotIndex; i < zones.length; i++) {
817	        if (isAvailable(i)) {
818	          targetIndex = i;
819	          break;
820	        }
821	      }
822	      if (targetIndex === -1) {
823	        for (let i = 0; i < activeSlotIndex; i++) {
824	          if (isAvailable(i)) {
825	            targetIndex = i;
826	            break;
827	          }
828	        }
829	      }
830	
831	      if (targetIndex === -1) {
832	        return { placed: false, zoneIndex: -1, rejected: false };
833	      }
834	
835	      if (config.wrongTileBehavior !== 'lock-manual') {
836	        const tile = allTiles.find((t) => t.id === tileId);
837	        if (tile && tile.value !== zones[targetIndex].expectedValue) {
838	          return {
839	            placed: false,
840	            zoneIndex: targetIndex,
841	            rejected: true,
842	          };
843	        }
844	      }
845	
846	      pendingPlacements.push({ tileId, zoneIndex: targetIndex });
847	      placeTile(tileId, targetIndex);
848	      return { placed: true, zoneIndex: targetIndex, rejected: false };
849	    },
850	    [
851	      zones,
852	      activeSlotIndex,
853	      config.wrongTileBehavior,
854	      allTiles,
855	      placeTile,
856	    ],
857	  );
858	
859	  return { placeInNextSlot };
860	};
861	```
862

1118	const handleClick = () => {
1119	  if (ref.current?.classList.contains('animate-shake')) return;
1120	
1121	  speakTile(tile.label);
1122	  const result = placeInNextSlot(tile.id);
1123	
1124	  if (result.rejected && ref.current) {
1125	    triggerShake(ref.current);
1126	    const el = ref.current;
1127	    el.style.background = 'var(--skin-wrong-bg)';
1128	    el.style.borderColor = 'var(--skin-wrong-border)';
1129	    el.addEventListener(
1130	      'animationend',
1131	      () => {
1132	        el.style.background = '';
1133	        el.style.borderColor = '';
1134	      },
1135	      { once: true },
1136	    );
1137	
1138	    if (!skin.suppressDefaultSounds) {
1139	      playSound('wrong', 0.8);
1140	    }
1141	
1142	    dispatch({
1143	      type: 'REJECT_TAP',
1144	      tileId: tile.id,
1145	      zoneIndex: result.zoneIndex,
1146	    });
1147	
1148	    getGameEventBus().emit({
1149	      type: 'game:evaluate',
1150	      gameId: state.config.gameId,
1151	      sessionId: '',
1152	      profileId: '',
1153	      timestamp: Date.now(),
1154	      roundIndex: state.roundIndex,
1155	      answer: tile.id,
1156	      correct: false,
1157	      nearMiss: false,
1158	      zoneIndex: result.zoneIndex,
1159	      expected: state.zones[result.zoneIndex]?.expectedValue ?? '',
1160	    });
1161	  }
1162	};

1187	When a tile is dropped onto a slot via touch drag and rejected (reject mode + wrong), shake the bank tile after it reappears.

1189	- [ ] **Step 1: Write failing test**
1190	
1191	First, add a mock for `useTouchDrag` at module scope (alongside the other mocks
1192	at the top of `useDraggableTile.test.tsx`). This captures the `onDrop` callback

1254	describe('touch drag reject path', () => {
1255	  it('calls triggerShake on bank tile when drag-drop is rejected in reject mode', () => {
1256	    mockWrongTileBehavior = 'reject';
1257	    mockPlaceTile.mockReturnValue({ correct: false });
1258

1265	      writable: true,
1266	    });

1268	    const onDrop = capturedTouchDragOptions.onDrop as (

1296	> **Note:** The `capturedTouchDragOptions` approach captures the callbacks
1297	> `useDraggableTile` passes to `useTouchDrag`. The `stateRef` used in
1298	> `onDrop` (line 29 of useDraggableTile.ts: `const stateRef = useRef(state)`)
1299	> ensures `wrongTileBehavior` reads the current value even inside a stale
1300	> closure. The `requestAnimationFrame` wrapper in the implementation defers
1301	> the shake until after React re-renders the tile at full opacity.
